61.reason: The print_tree() method outputs syntax component names after their content, but the specification requires them to be output before completing the analysis of each component (except <BlockItem>, <Decl>, <BType>). This violates the required output order.

234.reason: [When encountering a single '&', it should report error 'a' but NOT add an AND token to the token stream. Adding "&&" token here is incorrect as the input only has a single '&'.]

251.reason: [When encountering a single '|', it should report error 'a' but NOT add an OR token to the token stream. Adding "||" token here is incorrect as the input only has a single '|'.]

3290.reason: [Error: The error line for missing semicolon should be the line of the last token in Exp, not the assignment operator. According to problem description, "the error line number corresponds to the line where the last non-terminal before the semicolon is located", which would be the Exp's last token line]
